query:
INSERT INTO modifier_template_options (template_id, name, price, is_default, sort_order) VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Base' LIMIT 1), 'White Bread', '0.00', false, 0),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Base' LIMIT 1), 'Brown Bread', '0.00', false, 1),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Base' LIMIT 1), 'White Roll', '0.00', true, 2),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Base' LIMIT 1), 'Brown Roll', '0.00', false, 3),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Base' LIMIT 1), 'Plain Wrap', '0.00', false, 4),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Choose Your Base' LIMIT 1), 'Brown Wrap', '0.00', false, 5);
